results.title: US details agreement with Iran as Trump departs G7 summit
results.description: The terms of the preliminary agreement between the United States and Iran would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, outline a $300 billion plan for Iran’s reconstruction and lift restrictions on the country’s oil exports, according to details described by a senior U.S. official Wednesday. The post US details agreement with Iran as Trump departs G7 summit appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: ‘I’m the boss’, Trump says at G7, as he warms to Ukraine’s war aims
results.description: EVIAN-LES-BAINS, France — U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday told a roomful of global leaders “I’m the boss”, as he and other G7 heads acknowledged Ukraine’s improved battlefield fortunes with a unified pledge of support and fresh sanctions against Russia. The post ‘I’m the boss’, Trump says at G7, as he warms to Ukraine’s war aims appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: China defends critical minerals export controls, calls for end to ‘small cliques’ after G-7 statement
results.description: It comes after G-7 leaders agreed to step up coordination to cut their countries’ reliance on China.

results.title: Off the news: Reflect on Black history this Juneteenth
results.description: Friday is Juneteenth, a federal holiday that celebrates the abolition of slavery, freedom and Black history. In Hawaii, federal offices will be closed — but note that June 19 is not a paid state holiday, but is officially a day of remembrance and reflection.
